title: Lights, Camera, Action… Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A small, cosy corner or space where you can relax or hide.
rounds.answer: nook
rounds.explanation: nook: A small, cosy corner or space where you can relax or hide.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A type of cloth or fabric made by weaving threads together.
rounds.answer: textile
rounds.explanation: textile: A type of cloth or fabric made by weaving threads together.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to a father or a father figure.
rounds.answer: paternal
rounds.explanation: paternal: Related to a father or a father figure.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: An area of land covered with trees and plants.
rounds.answer: woodland

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A type of cloth or fabric made by weaving threads together.
rounds.answer: textile

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Related to a father or a father figure.
rounds.answer: paternal

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The lemur slept in a little nook inside the hollow tree.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The farmer was happy because the soil was very fertile.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The rangers filled the feeders with edible fruit.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Lights, Camera, Action…: source text 2': The sun has just risen over the _____ forest.
rounds.answer: bamboo
rounds.explanation: The text says: The sun has just risen over the bamboo forest.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Nookwatch: The Forest Mission, part 3': “Even _____ land can lose life.” At lunchtime, the group discussed a new case.
rounds.answer: fertile
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Even fertile land can lose life.” At lunchtime, the group discussed a new case.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Lights, Camera, Action…: source text 2': We read the animal-care _____ last night.
rounds.answer: manual
rounds.explanation: The text says: We read the animal-care manual last night.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Perform Your Own Script
rounds.target: The lemur slept in a little nook inside the hollow tree.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Choral Reading
rounds.target: The Narrator in "The Forest Guardians" speaks directly to the audience.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The twisted footprints looked abnormal to the students.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Some people are in denial about how harmful hunting traps are.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Protecting wildlife is a constitutional responsibility.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'economical'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: economical is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'style'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: style is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'manual'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: manual is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A tall plant with hard, hollow stems that grows in warm places.
Able to produce many plants or crops; good for growing things.
A small container that holds something inside, like medicine or equipment.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Safe to eat; something you can eat.
Very important or necessary; or describing a serious situation.
Related to a mother or motherhood.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Not taking sides or not showing strong feelings.
Related to the system of rules that a country follows.
A small, round indentation or mark on a surface.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'groove' mean?
choices: A book that gives instructions on how to do something.
A book that students use to learn about a subject in school.
A long, narrow cut or channel in a surface.
A small container that holds something inside, like medicine or equipment.
rounds.answer: A long, narrow cut or channel in a surface.
rounds.explanation: The old tree had deep grooves in its bark where insects lived.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Lights, Camera, Action…: source text 2': Today, our oldest lemur is missing from his sleeping _____.
rounds.answer: nook
rounds.explanation: The text says: Today, our oldest lemur is missing from his sleeping nook.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Lights, Camera, Action…: source text 1': You will also learn about compound nouns — words made by combining two smaller words to create a new...
rounds.answer: woodland
rounds.explanation: The text says: You will also learn about compound nouns — words made by combining two smaller words to create a new meaning, such as woodland or textbook.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'nook' mean?
choices: A long, narrow cut or channel in a surface.
A small, cosy corner or space where you can relax or hide.
A tall plant with hard, hollow stems that grows in warm places.
Able to produce many plants or crops; good for growing things.
rounds.answer: A small, cosy corner or space where you can relax or hide.
rounds.explanation: The lemur slept in a little nook inside the hollow tree.

rounds.prompt: What does 'woodland' mean?
choices: A book that students use to learn about a subject in school.
A long, narrow cut or channel in a surface.
Able to produce many plants or crops; good for growing things.
An area of land covered with trees and plants.
rounds.answer: An area of land covered with trees and plants.
rounds.explanation: We followed a path through the woodland and heard birds singing.

rounds.prompt: What does 'bamboo' mean?
choices: A book that gives instructions on how to do something.
A book that students use to learn about a subject in school.
A tall plant with hard, hollow stems that grows in warm places.
Able to produce many plants or crops; good for growing things.
rounds.answer: A tall plant with hard, hollow stems that grows in warm places.
rounds.explanation: The panda loves to eat bamboo because it is very tasty.
